description_long: This object is a Polaroid instant camera with a predominantly white plastic body and a distinctive retro design. The front features a large circular lens, a flash unit, a viewfinder, and a prominent red shutter button, along with a rainbow stripe above the lens. The top and sides are angular, with a sloped section leading to the lens assembly, and the back is mostly flat with a small circular button and two rectangular slots near the base. The camera has a film ejection slot at the front bottom, and subtle branding is visible on the front face. The overall form is compact and boxy, with smooth, matte surfaces and minimal external protrusions. This camera is designed to be portable and is likely constructed from lightweight plastic with some internal metal and glass components.
description: A white Polaroid instant camera with a retro, boxy design, featuring a large lens, flash, and rainbow stripe on the front. The camera has smooth, matte surfaces and compact, angular housing.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the sloped body, lens protrusion, and a USB port.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the lens, flash, viewfinder, red shutter button, rainbow stripe, and Polaroid branding.
description_view_2: Right side view highlighting the angular slope and a small circular button.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat back with two rectangular slots and a small round button.
